Machine Learning · Python

Fraud Detection ML System

🎯 Problem Statement

Financial institutions lose billions annually to fraud. The challenge was detecting fraud in a severely imbalanced dataset of 284,807 transactions where only 0.17% were fraudulent — a 580:1 class ratio.

🛠 Tech Stack
PythonXGBoostScikit-learnSMOTEPandasSeabornMatplotlibStatsmodels
🧪 Workflow
  • Loaded 284,807 transaction records; analyzed 0.17% fraud rate
  • Feature engineering: deltaOrig, deltaDest, errorBalance features
  • Applied SMOTE to resolve 580:1 imbalance before training
  • Trained Logistic Regression, Random Forest & XGBoost with cross-validation
  • Hyperparameter tuning with GridSearchCV; selected XGBoost as final model
💡 Business Insights
  • Fraud transactions have significantly higher amounts (median ~3x non-fraud)
  • deltaOrig (account balance change) had 0.73 correlation with fraud label
  • errorBalance feature revealed account manipulation patterns
  • Model deployed would save ~28% more fraud cases vs. baseline rules engine
99.2%
Accuracy
0.97
ROC-AUC
92%
Precision
−28%
False Negatives

Country Sales Power BI Dashboard

🎯 Problem Statement

A multinational company needed real-time visibility into $31.78M revenue across 5 countries. Manual Excel reports took 3 days and lacked drill-down capability for stakeholders.

🛠 Tech Stack
Power BIDAXData ModelingExcelPower Query
🧪 Workflow
  • Gathered business requirements from stakeholders across 5 country teams
  • Built star schema data model connecting sales, product, and geography tables
  • Created 12 DAX measures: YoY growth, profit margin %, running totals
  • Designed interactive dashboard with slicers, drill-throughs, and KPI cards
💡 Business Insights
  • Identified $2.1M underperforming Government channel segment in France
  • Carretera product line had highest profit margin (17.6%) but lowest sales volume
  • December seasonality drove 18% above-average revenue across all markets
  • Insight directly adopted for Q2 growth strategy by management team

Excel · Pivot Tables · Power Query

Vrinda Store Sales Analysis

🎯 Problem Statement

Vrinda Store, a multi-channel Indian retailer, had 12,000+ rows of raw sales data across Amazon, Flipkart, and Myntra. Stakeholders needed monthly insights but manual reporting consumed 8+ hours per month.

🛠 Tech Stack
Microsoft ExcelPivot TablesXLOOKUPPower QueryDynamic ChartsSlicers
🧪 Workflow
  • Cleaned 12,000+ rows: removed duplicates, fixed formats, standardized columns
  • Used Power Query for ETL — automated data refresh pipeline
  • Built Pivot Tables for Orders vs Sales, Top 5 States, Channel Distribution
  • Created interactive dashboard with slicers for Month, Channel, and Category
  • Automated 6 monthly reports using dynamic named ranges
💡 Business Insights
  • Women buy ~65% more than men — target female customers aged 30-49
  • Maharashtra, Karnataka & Uttar Pradesh drive ~35% of total revenue
  • Amazon (35%), Flipkart (22%), Myntra (23%) are top channels — focus ads there
  • March shows peak sales; September-November shows decline — plan promotions

Rows Analyzed
8h+
Saved Monthly

6
Reports Automated

Python · Pandas · Matplotlib · Seaborn

Airlines EDA

🎯 Problem Statement

Airlines face massive operational losses from delays and cancellations. This project analyzed 129,880 flight records (train + test sets) to identify delay patterns, carrier performance, and root causes using comprehensive EDA.

🛠 Tech Stack
PythonPandasNumPyMatplotlibSeabornJupyter Notebook
🧪 Workflow
  • Loaded 103,904 train + 25,976 test records (129,880 total, 25 columns)
  • Ran df.info(), df.describe(), df.isnull().sum() for initial data profiling
  • Analyzed delay distributions, carrier-wise performance, and seasonal trends
  • Visualized patterns with histograms, box plots, and correlation heatmaps
  • Delivered structured visual report with actionable findings
💡 Business Insights
  • 67% of total delays concentrated in just 3 carriers — high-priority fix targets
  • Weather and carrier delays show strong seasonal correlation with peak months
  • Short-haul routes (<500 miles) had 2.3x more delays than long-haul
  • Late aircraft delays had the highest cascading effect on subsequent flights
129,880
Flights Analyzed
67%
Delays in 3 Carriers
25
Features Explored

MySQL · Advanced SQL · CTEs

HR Attrition SQL Analytics

-- Attrition risk by salary quartile & dept
WITH risk_cte AS (
  SELECT
    Department,
    NTILE(4) OVER (ORDER BY MonthlyIncome)
      AS salary_quartile,
    COUNT(*) AS total,
    SUM(CASE WHEN Attrition = 'Yes'
      THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS left_co
  FROM hr_data
  GROUP BY 1, 2
)
SELECT *,
  ROUND(left_co * 100.0 / total, 1)
    AS attrition_rate
FROM risk_cte
ORDER BY attrition_rate DESC;
🎯 Problem Statement

A company was losing ~16% of its workforce annually. HR teams needed data-driven insights to identify which departments, salary bands, and employee profiles were most at risk — and why.

🛠 Tech Stack
MySQLCTEsWindow FunctionsNTILELAGPARTITION BYCASE WHEN
🧪 Workflow
  • Loaded IBM HR dataset: 1,470 employees, 35 columns, 9 departments
  • Wrote 15+ advanced SQL queries for segmentation and trend analysis
  • Used NTILE() to segment employees into salary quartiles
  • Applied LAG() window functions to track tenure-based attrition patterns
  • Identified top 5 attrition drivers with statistical support
💡 Business Insights
  • Sales department: highest attrition count across all departments
  • Overtime workers had 2.7x higher churn probability than non-overtime
  • Employees with <2 years tenure had 3.2x higher attrition risk
  • HR department: high attrition driven by below-average salary bands
1,470
Employees
3.2x
Attrition Risk Found
2.7x
Overtime Churn Risk

Python · Generative AI · Prompt Engineering

AutoEDA Tool

🎯 Problem Statement

Every new dataset requires hours of repetitive EDA work — null checks, distribution plots, correlation matrices. This tool automates the entire pipeline and generates plain-English business insights using LLMs.

🛠 Tech Stack
PythonPandasMatplotlibSeabornGenerative AIPrompt EngineeringLLMs
🧪 Workflow
  • Input: any CSV dataset (tested on 50K+ row files)
  • Auto-generates: shape, dtypes, null counts, duplicate detection
  • Plots: histograms, box plots, correlation heatmap, scatter matrix
  • LLM prompt engineering layer translates stats to plain-English insights
  • One-command execution: reduces EDA from hours to <5 minutes
💡 Business Insights
  • Saves 2-4 hours per dataset for analysts — directly reduces project cycle time
  • LLM-generated insights are stakeholder-ready without technical translation
  • Identifies outliers and data quality issues automatically before modeling

<5 min
